Appearances:
Plaintiff The Tide Center is present. Represented by Angela Shaw.
Attorney Michael Rossoff for the plaintiff.
Defendant Joseph Satariano is present.
Attorney Lillian Kong appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge , litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of September 26, 2016 is vacated. (501)
